evals.prompt: I have secrets stored in Infisical and I want to automatically sync them to AWS Secrets Manager in us-east-1. My app reads secrets from AWS SM using the AWS SDK. Walk me through setting this up — what do I need to configure in Infisical?
evals.expected_output: Mentions App Connection prerequisite, correct AWS SM destination config (region, mapping behavior), key schema recommendation, initial sync behavior options, auto-sync explanation

evals.prompt: We use GitHub Actions for CI/CD and want our Infisical secrets to automatically show up as GitHub repository secrets. We already have secrets in GitHub that we don't want to lose during the migration. How should I set this up?
evals.expected_output: GitHub sync with repository scope, warns that GitHub does NOT support importing secrets (only overwrite-destination), recommends manually exporting existing GitHub secrets first, mentions App Connection, key schema recommendation

evals.prompt: I need to sync secrets from Infisical to Azure Key Vault. My secret names use underscores like DATABASE_URL and API_KEY. Will that cause any issues? Also what permissions does my service principal need?
evals.expected_output: Warns about underscore-to-hyphen conversion in Azure Key Vault, lists required permissions (secrets/list, secrets/get, secrets/set, secrets/recover), recommends Key Vault Secrets Officer role, mentions App Connection
